# RestrictedSandboxAppliable

**Protocol**

A protocol that browser extensions implement to opt into a more restricted sandbox.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol RestrictedSandboxAppliable
```

## Overview

Call [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/RestrictedSandboxAppliable/applyRestrictedSandbox(revision:)] to enter the restricted sandbox, indicating which revision of the sandbox restrictions to apply. In revision 1, corresponding to [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/RestrictedSandboxRevision/revision1], additional restrictions affect the web content extension only. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/limiting-resource-access-in-content-extensions].

## Applying sandbox restrictions

- **applyRestrictedSandbox(revision:)**: Puts a browser extension into a more restricted sandbox.
- **RestrictedSandboxRevision**: Revisions to the restricted sandbox rules.

## Access control

- **Limiting resource access in web content extensions**: Reduce the impact of vulnerabilities in web content extensions by limiting privileges.
- **Accessing files in browser extensions**: Grant extensions access to files from within your browser app.
- **Attributing memory to a content extension**: Adhere to operating-system limits on GPU memory use.
- **RestrictedSandboxRevision**: Revisions to the restricted sandbox rules.

## Inherited By

- NetworkingExtension
- RenderingExtension
- WebContentExtension
